chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-663 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.2992/2023 2. For hearing of CMA No.2731/2023 3. For hearing of main case 05-10-2023 Syed Israr Ahmed Shah, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Zuber Ahmed Rajput, Advocate for Respondent No.5 Mr. Ishfaque Hussain Abro, Assistant Attorney General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioners under instructions does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
